title: CS 6 Pack Extra Large Plastic Dust Sheets for Decorating 3.6 x 2.7m (12 x 9ft), Light Dust Sheet for Painting & Furniture, Plastic Sheet-Plastic Sheeting-Decorating Tools-Decorating Sheets-Dust Cover
features: PAINT WITH CONFIDENCE AND NO MORE STAINS: Smooth out your home décor project with our paint cover sheets. Serving as painting sheets, plastic sheets for painting, paint protection film, drop cloth, & paint sheets for decorating.

ROBUST DEBRIS PROTECTION FOR RENOVATION: CS large dust sheets and plastic cover sheet ensure your furniture & floors stay immaculate during renovation. Acting as an effective alternative to plastic dust sheet roll & cotton dust sheets for decorating.

6-PACK ESSENTIAL COVERAGE, IDEAL FOR MULTI-ROOM RENOVATIONS: Get better protection than the typical floor covering for painting,floor protector,polythene dust sheet. Ensuring every corner and crevice stays spotless during your painting and decorating.

LIGHT DURABILITY, INTENDED FOR LIGHT USE ONLY: CS plastic floor covering, decorators dust sheets, dust covers for furniture, and painting dust sheets help you complete your set of painting tools. Usable as a plastic carpet protector or during plastering.

ECO-CONSCIOUS, GLOBALLY CERTIFIED 55% RECYCLED PLASTIC: CS with our dust sheets for furniture is committed to sustainability right from the source, we exclusively work with suppliers dedicated to real sustainability beyond the marketing.
